title: Admin Users
subtitle: Internal back-office staff. Define roles in <0>Settings → Roles & Access</0>, then assign them here.
noRolesWarn: No assignable roles exist yet. Create one from <0>Settings → Roles & Access → Roles</0> before adding admin users.

filters.search: Search by name, ID, phone, email…

founderTooltip: The Founding Super Admin cannot be modified from the UI.
accessRequiredHint: Only the Super Admin can manage admin users.

create.title: Add Admin User
create.desc: Create a new internal back-office user. They'll log in with their National ID or phone, plus the password you set here.

edit.title: Edit Admin User
edit.desc: Update profile, role, or set a new password. Leave the password field empty to keep it unchanged.

confirm.deactivateBody: {{name}} will be unable to sign in until reactivated.

form.passwordEdit: New Password (leave empty to keep current)
form.passwordPhCreate: Min 8 chars, with upper, lower, number, special
form.passwordHint: Must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, one special character.
